name: DFSCoerce
summary: DFSCoerce is a Python PoC that uses the MS-DFSNM (Distributed File System Namespace) protocol to coerce Windows hosts to authenticate to an attacker-controlled listener — useful for NTLM relay chains.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
